objections.description: Critical-path theme initialization script is truncated mid-expression. Cannot verify FOUC prevention logic, fallback chain for prefers-color-scheme, or data-theme attribute application. Without the complete script, SSR/SSG hydration mismatches and flash-of-unstyled-content are guaranteed.
objections.suggested_fix: Complete the script with explicit attribute setting and error handling: `document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', t || 'dark');` wrapped in try-catch to survive CSP/localStorage restrictions.

objections.description: Missing migration strategy from existing Alpine/Tailwind static implementation to React. The _legacy folder quarantine is mentioned but no cutover plan, URL routing conflict resolution, or rollback procedure is defined. Risk of total frontend outage during deployment.
objections.suggested_fix: Add migration phase: (1) Mount React root inside existing Alpine container with `display: contents` bridge, (2) Feature-flag routes to switch between Alpine and React shells, (3) Deprecate Alpine only after 100% traffic validation.

objections.description: Breakpoint definitions conflict with Tailwind defaults. Spec claims 'sm: 375px (base)' but Tailwind's sm: is 640px. Using standard Tailwind prefixes (sm:, md:, lg:) with custom breakpoint values will cause layout collapse on devices between 375px and 639px.
objections.suggested_fix: Either provide explicit tailwind.config.js breakpoint overrides in the spec (screens: { sm: '375px', md: '768px', lg: '1440px' }) or adopt Tailwind's default scale and adjust component logic.

objections.description: Tab bar hiding mechanism is underspecified. 'Tab bar hidden when bottom sheet is open' lacks DOM behavior definition—removing from DOM breaks focus-return-to-trigger, while visibility:hidden leaks to screen readers. Also missing drag velocity thresholds for dismissal gesture.
objections.suggested_fix: Specify: Tab Bar receives `aria-hidden='true' inert` (or `tabindex='-1'` + CSS `visibility:hidden`) when sheet open. Add physics: dismiss threshold at 20% sheet height OR velocity > 0.5px/ms downward.

objections.description: Conditional global state ('optional — only if cross-screen data sharing needed') creates architectural inconsistency. Teams will inconsistently implement caching, leading to cache duplication or stampede conditions. Stale-while-revalidate logic lacks request deduplication for simultaneous mount scenarios.
objections.suggested_fix: Mandate DataContext for all server state. Implement request deduplication via `pendingPromises` Map keyed by cache key to prevent thundering herd on 30s cache expiry.

objections.description: Focus management on route change ('move focus to <main> heading (h1>) assumes h1 is programmatically focusable. Standard h1 elements are not focusable by default; calling .focus() will fail silently in some browsers without tabindex='-1'.
objections.suggested_fix: Specify that all screen containers must have `tabindex='-1'` and `outline: none` (or visible focus ring only on :focus-visible) to enable programmatic focus without introducing ugly focus rings on mouse navigation.

suggestions.description: Add explicit bundle budget enforcement: `esbuild --metafile` output should be parsed in CI to fail builds if entry chunk exceeds 60KB gzipped.

Clarify skeleton-to-content transition: specify `aria-busy='true'` on container during skeleton phase and `aria-live='polite'` announcement 'Dashboard loaded' only if user is on screen > 3s (prevent noise on fast loads).
